devdoc.author: PanjoCoin Team
devdoc.details: Vesting contract for PanjoCoin (PNJC) tokens with cliff + linear release. Security highlights:      - All critical parameters are immutable (cannot be changed after deployment)      - ReentrancyGuard protects the claim function      - SafeERC20 prevents token transfer issues      - No backdoors or admin overrides for vested tokens Typical use cases in PanjoCoin:      - Team vesting: cliff 12 months, vesting 36 months      - Treasury vesting: cliff 3 months, vesting 24 months      - Founder vesting: cliff 12 months, vesting 36 months      - Marketing vesting: cliff 0 months, vesting 12 months

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

params.token: Address of the token that was withdrawn

claim().details: Claim all currently available tokensUses nonReentrant modifier to prevent reentrancy attacks Execution flow:      1. Verify caller is the beneficiary      2. Calculate claimable amount      3. Verify amount > 0      4. Update state (released += amount)      5. Transfer tokens to beneficiary      6. Emit event The checks-effects-interactions pattern is followed:      - State is updated before external call (safeTransfer)      - This prevents reentrancy even without the modifier

constructor.details: Deploys the vesting contract and immediately locks the tokens Requirements:      - _beneficiary cannot be address(0)      - _token cannot be address(0)      - _totalAmount must be greater than 0      - _cliffDuration must be less than or equal to _vestingDuration      - The deployer must have approved this contract to spend _totalAmount tokens Example for Team Vesting (12 month cliff, 36 month vesting):      _beneficiary = teamMultisigAddress      _start = block.timestamp + 365 days      _cliffDuration = 365 days      _vestingDuration = 1095 days (3 years)

params._beneficiary: The address that will receive the vested tokens
params._cliffDuration: Duration of the cliff period in seconds
params._token: The ERC20 token address (PanjoCoin contract address)
params._totalAmount: Total amount of tokens to vest (with decimals, e.g., 1e18 for 1 token)

emergencyWithdraw(address).details: Withdraw ANY OTHER token accidentally sent to this contractSecurity guarantee:      - The function explicitly checks that _otherToken is NOT the vesting token      - Even if the check fails, safeTransfer would fail because the contract owns no PNJC Requirements:      - Only the contract owner can call this function      - The token to withdraw cannot be the vesting token      - The contract must have a balance of the token to withdraw

getContractBalance().details: Returns the total balance of tokens held by this contract

returns._0: uint256 Current timestamp in UNIX seconds

getLockedTokens().details: Returns the amount of tokens still locked (not yet claimable)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

releasable().details: Calculates the amount of tokens currently available to claimReturns 0 if no tokens are available to claim

returns._0: uint256 Amount that can be claimed now (vested - already claimed)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

vestedAmount().details: Calculates the total amount of tokens that have vested so farMathematical formula:      if block.timestamp < cliff:                                    return 0      if block.timestamp >= start + vestingDuration:                 return totalAmount      else:                                                          return totalAmount * (block.timestamp - cliff) / vestingDuration The calculation uses integer math with multiplication before division      to maintain maximum precision. No floating point is used.

returns._0: uint256 Amount vested (includes already claimed tokens)

beneficiary.details: Must be a non-zero address, typically a multisig wallet

released.details: Increases each time claim() is calledCannot exceed totalAmount

start.details: If start > block.timestamp, cliff period is active

token.details: This is the token that will be released over time

totalAmount.details: This is the maximum that can ever be claimed

vestingDuration.details: After start + vestingDuration, all tokens are vested

devdoc.title: PanjoCoinVesting

EmergencyWithdrawn(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when owner withdraws a non-vested token sent by mistake

TokensReleased(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when beneficiary successfully claims tokens

beneficiary().notice: Address that can claim vested tokens (cannot be changed)

claim().notice: Can be called multiple times; only the beneficiary can call

cliff().notice: Timestamp (UNIX seconds) when cliff ends and first tokens become available

emergencyWithdraw(address).notice: This function exists to rescue tokens that were sent to this contract by mistakeThis CANNOT be used to withdraw the vested token (PanjoCoin PNJC)

getContractBalance().notice: Should equal totalAmount - released under normal conditions

getCurrentTime().notice: Useful for off-chain verification of vesting progress

getLockedTokens().notice: Locked tokens = totalAmount - vestedAmount (NOT totalAmount - released)

releasable().notice: This is the amount that would be transferred if claim() is called

released().notice: Amount of tokens already claimed by the beneficiary

token().notice: The ERC20 token being vested (PanjoCoin PNJC)

totalAmount().notice: Total amount of tokens locked in this contract

vestedAmount().notice: Vested amount is calculated as:         - 0% before cliff         - Linear from 0% to 100% between cliff and start+vestingDuration         - 100% after start+vestingDuration

vestingDuration().notice: Duration of the linear vesting period in seconds

userdoc.notice: This contract implements a standard vesting schedule where:         - Tokens are completely locked during the cliff period         - After cliff, tokens unlock linearly over the vesting duration         - Only the beneficiary can claim tokens         - The owner can only rescue non-PNJC tokens sent by mistake
